subcodes.first_line: In thy letter was mention of powerlessness to transcend limitations. Abandon thou this saying, and hearken unto the call of thy Lord, the Mighty, the All-Loving [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد کان فی کتابک ذکر العجز عن کسر الحدود دع هذا القول ثم استمع ندآء ربک العزیز الودود
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @exhortations and counsels
